title: Global Local Festival Of The Global Remix
description: Dishoom Permit Room presents: Global Local and Going South – a Celebration of South Asian Fusion Taking over Brighton’s Caravanserai on Friday May 15th, with live music and performers from 18:00 to 23:00PM. KLUB KAPUT: - KARMA SHEEN - South Asian Psychedelic music, fresh from their Texas Tour - BHANGRA ALL STARS - Jumping versions of Bhangra and Western classics with an Asian Bassline flavour from Sir Bobby Friction, Bee2 and many others - INDIAN MAN - One of the UK's most innovative South Asian Producers (Real World Records) UNDER THE ARCHWAY: - THE MEHFIL SPACE - Curating South Asian classical music and ghazal, combining music and poetry with DJ Equal i, James Pusey (Sitar), Marc Clayton (Tabla), Mithila Sarma (Veena) + DJs on the amazing Chairoplane Decks. Dishoom Permit Room will be dishing out goodies across the site. And quench your curiosity with their cocktails sold at the bar, (over the whole weekend!) A spectacular show filling all the senses and spirits

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
